close_reason: Defined extraction protocol with Result, Package, and Import types. Supports test imports, build tags, aliases, and non-fatal errors.
description:
# Extraction Protocol

Define a JSON protocol for dependency extractors.

## Schema

```json
{
  "version": "1",
  "language": "go",
  "packages": [
    {
      "path": "src/cmd/tk",
      "files": ["main.go", "sync.go"],
      "imports": [
        {"path": "github.com/foo/bar", "kind": "external"},
        {"path": "github.com/firefly-engineering/turnkey/src/go/pkg/rules", "kind": "internal"}
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

## Tasks

- [ ] Define JSON schema for extraction output
- [ ] Create Go types for protocol in a shared package
- [ ] Document protocol for extractor implementers
- [ ] Consider edge cases: build tags, test files, conditional compilation
title: Phase 2: Extraction Protocol
